headline: Qualcomm’s Edge AI Push Into Enterprise Meeting Rooms Faces Valuation Hurdles
summary: Qualcomm (NasdaqGS:QCOM) and Primax Electronics have launched an AI powered enterprise conference platform built around Qualcomm's Dragonwing processor. Micron Technology  added 2% to $968.53.
